operations.description: Analyzes a review by its ID and returns sentiment and issues.
operations.name: review.analyze

operations.description: Generates a reply draft for a given review ID with an optional tone.
operations.name: reply.generateDraft

operations.description: Updates a reply draft by its ID with new text.
operations.name: reply.updateDraft

operations.description: Marks a review as sent by its ID.
operations.name: review.markSent

operations.description: Creates action items from a review ID with given titles.
operations.name: action.createFromReview

operations.description: Updates the status of an action item by its ID.
operations.name: action.updateStatus

operations.description: Lists reviews based on filters: sentiment, tag, status, textQuery.
operations.name: search.listReviews
